LanguageData.COMIGO_FloatingTurret_Slug.description: An anchored turret that can float on water and fires a heavy round, capable of defeating armor at long distance.
LanguageData.COMIGO_FloatingTurret_EMP.description: An anchored turret that can float and that launches various explosive shells.
LanguageData.COMIGO_FloatingTurret_EMP.label: Floating turret with a grenade launcher
